[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001000 4
1 000000001 1
2 000100010 2
3 000000000 a
4 010001111 5
5 000110111 5
6 111000110 5
7 001001000 2

23 32 011001111 6

45 54 111110111 8
56 65 111001110 6
67 76 111101011 7
70 07 111101011 7

13 31 011101111 7

57 75 111101111 8

71 17 111101011 7

14 41 001110111 6
25 52 111000110 5 match 6
36 63 011001111 6
47 74 111111111 a
50 05 111000111 6
61 16 001101010 4
72 27 111101011 7

15 51 111100110 6
26 62 001001000 2 match 7
37 73 111101111 8
